options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: max_level
options.description:
Maximum shop level to reach.
Rounded up to the nearest multiple of 5.

Hosts may limit this to 60 with a Host.yaml setting.

options.name: licenses_per_region
options.description:
Number of licenses available every 5 levels.

Distributed as evenly as possible across all 4 shop pages.

options.name: required_licenses
options.description:
Number of sellable Product Licenses within your current level to unlock the next 5 levels.

Lower values make progression easier.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Main victory condition.

Max Level: Reach the max level
Collection Builder: Unlock all packs and collect a target amount of cards.
Sell Ghost Cards: Find and sell ghost cards hidden in the multiworld.

options.name: collection_goal_percentage
options.description:
Collection percentage required after unlocking all packs.

Hosts may limit this to 60% with a Host.yaml setting.

options.name: ghost_goal_amount
options.description:
Number of ghost cards required for victory.

Ghost card items will be added to the multiworld.

options.name: start_with_worker
options.description:
Start with a hired worker.

You must still pay their daily salary.

options.name: auto_renovate
options.description: Automatically renovate shop expansions when received. Never look at RENO BIGG again!

options.name: sell_check_amount
options.description:
Number of sell checks per product.

Selling an entire box counts as one check.

options.name: bulk_box
options.description: Selling bulk boxes from the workbench can grant checks.

options.name: extra_starting_item_checks
options.description:
Adds extra early checks to prevent generation failures on limited starts.

Checks per item are capped at 16 regardless of this setting

options.name: play_table_checks
options.description: Number of checks available per play table format.

options.name: no_formats
options.description: All play table formats share one combined check pool.

options.name: checks_opening_difficulty
options.description:
Difficulty of achievement checks for opening cards.

There are around 10 achievements for each difficulty. Harder options include easier achievements.

Example achievements:
Easy: First common foil
Medium: Open 20 gold border foils from legendary packs
Hard: Collect all 12 versions of a card
Impossible: Collect 100 full arts from a pack

options.name: checks_selling_difficulty
options.description:
Difficulty of achievement checks for selling cards.

There are around 10 achievements for each difficulty. Harder options include easier achievements.

Example goals:
Easy: Sell 20 commons
Medium: Sell 100 foils
Hard: Sell 1000 cards
Impossible: Sell 50 foil full arts

options.name: checks_grading_difficulty
options.description:
Difficulty of achievement checks for grading cards.

There are around 10 achievements for each difficulty. Harder options include easier achievements.

Grading checks take much longer and are better for async games.

Example goals:
Easy: Grade 10 commons
Medium: Grade 50 foils
Hard: Grade 100 cards
Impossible: Grade 20 foil full arts

options.name: card_sanity
options.description:
Individual cards become location checks.

Enabled:
Different card variants count as separate checks based on Card Opening difficulty.

Unique Foils:
Foil cards also count as separate checks.

Each enabled card variant adds 242 checks.
Impossible difficulty with Unique Foils adds 2904 checks.

This is based on your choice of card opening difficulty above.

Card variants by opening difficulty:
Easy: Basic
Medium: Basic, 1st Edition, Silver Edition
Hard: Basic, 1st Edition, Silver Edition, Gold Edition
Impossible: All Cards

options.name: deathlink
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: money_filler
options.description: Weight for filler items that give money.

options.name: xp_filler
options.description: Weight for filler items that give shop XP.

options.name: card_filler
options.description: Weight for filler items that give a random new card.

options.name: wallet_filler
options.description: Weight for filler items that increase customer spending money.

options.name: luck_filler
options.description:
Weight for filler items that increase card luck.

At max card luck (100) you have the same chance to open a non-foil basic card and a foil full art card

options.name: trap_fill
options.description: Percentage of junk items replaced with traps.

options.name: stink_trap
options.description:
You know what this does. Stinky.
Weight for traps that are Stink Traps.

Requires traps to be enabled.

options.name: poltergeist_trap
options.description:
Something is messing with the lights
Weight for traps that are Poltergeist Traps.

Requires traps to be enabled.

options.name: credit_card_failure_trap
options.description:
Sometimes they only have cash.
Weight for traps that disable credit card payments temporarily.

Requires traps to be enabled.

options.name: decrease_card_luck_trap
options.description:
Weight for traps that reduce card luck.

Requires traps to be enabled.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
